'''zanguthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:niccolite|niccolite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ng-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niccolite|niccolite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zanguthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zængithith|zængithith]] || [[word:zængithij|zængithij]] || [[word:zængithish|zængithish]] || [[word:zængithi|zængithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zangunguthuth|zangunguthuth]] || [[word:zangunguthuj|zangunguthuj]] || [[word:zangunguthush|zangunguthush]] || [[word:zangunguthu|zangunguthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zanguthuth|zanguthuth]] || [[word:zanguthuj|zanguthuj]] || [[word:zanguthush|zanguthush]] || [[word:zanguthu|zanguthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zangufthufth|zangufthufth]] || [[word:zangufthufj|zangufthufj]] || [[word:zangufthufsh|zangufthufsh]] || [[word:zangufthuf|zangufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zanguthuthu|zanguthuthu]] || [[word:zanguthuju|zanguthuju]] || [[word:zanguthushu|zanguthushu]] || [[word:zanguthuku|zanguthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zanguthuth|zanguthuth]] || [[word:zanguthuj|zanguthuj]] || [[word:zanguthush|zanguthush]] || [[word:zanguthu|zanguthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zanguthuthul|zanguthuthul]] || [[word:zanguthujul|zanguthujul]] || [[word:zanguthushul|zanguthushul]] || [[word:zanguthukul|zanguthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zanguthuuthuthu|zanguthuuthuthu]] || [[word:zanguthuujuju|zanguthuujuju]] || [[word:zanguthuushushu|zanguthuushushu]] || [[word:zanguthuuku|zanguthuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zanguthuthun|zanguthuthun]] || [[word:zanguthujun|zanguthujun]] || [[word:zanguthushun|zanguthushun]] || [[word:zanguthukun|zanguthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zanguthuthuoro|zanguthuthuoro]] || [[word:zanguthujuoro|zanguthujuoro]] || [[word:zanguthushuoro|zanguthushuoro]] || [[word:zanguthukuoro|zanguthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
